pages.title: Set a Hitchpost
pages.text: A $(item)Lead$() and any block in the $(item)Fences$() tag will do. Simple build, mighty useful.

pages.title: Tie Up Properly
pages.text: Place a hitchpost near a ridden horse, or near another owned horse, to tether it in place. The post only works with horses that belong to you, and breaking it releases the tether.
